subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted to the Kingdom of God! During the days I spent in thy home I was the recipient of thine utmost kindness
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب ملکوت الله ایامی که در خانه تو بودم نهایت مهربانی از تو دیدم فراموش
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @power; influence of a single soul in teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement
